Oded Welgreen
projects • music • art • talks • about

Projects

When I want to learn a concept I try to do it while building something using that concept. It helps me understand it better as it is easier to explore it by actually using it. My projects for the most part either have a well-defined goal, or are explorations guided by curiosity.

  • Intervalist
    code
    tool web
    Define and run custom sequences of timers, back-to-back, with zero friction.
  • Cellular Automata Playground
    code • video
    generative web
    A tool to explore cellular automata with various rules.
  • TempoGDX
    code
    audio mobile
    An open source metronome app built with libGDX.
  • Map of Thedas
    code
    tool web
    A searchable map of Thedas - the Dragon Age world.
  • Karcero
    code
    generative library
    A procedural dungeon tile based map generator.
  • Game of Music
    code • video
    audio generative web
    A music sequencer that uses Conway's Game of Life's rules to generate each state. Build and share a url directly to your track.
  • Super Fantasy Queue
    code • soundtrack
    game web
    A short game about the most important decision a hero could make — which line to stand in. Made for Github's 2013 game off jam.
  • caseIt
    code
    tool web
    A simple web tool for text transformations designed to work with keyboard shortcuts.
© 2026 Oded Welgreen
